svg.title: Gesture-controlled robotic arm full system architecture
svg.desc: Full architecture showing laptop with OpenCV/MediaPipe sending TCP packets over WiFi to ESP32, which forwards via UART to Arduino Nano, which drives 5 servos on the robotic arm.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the laptop layer in detail')
sendPrompt('How does OpenCV capture the webcam feed?')
sendPrompt('How does MediaPipe detect hand landmarks?')
sendPrompt('How are finger ratios converted to servo angles?')
sendPrompt('Explain the ESP32 layer in detail')
sendPrompt('How does the ESP32 WiFi server work?')
sendPrompt('How does the ESP32 validate the 7-byte packet?')
sendPrompt('How does the ESP32 forward data to the Nano via UART?')
sendPrompt('Explain the Arduino Nano layer in detail')
sendPrompt('How does the Nano receive serial bytes?')
sendPrompt('How does the Nano parse the 7-byte packet?')
sendPrompt('How does the Nano write servo PWM signals?')
sendPrompt('What are all 5 servos and which finger controls each?')

svg.text: Click any block to learn more
